prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ software optimization for the **APP 310** (dual-motor) or **APP 290** (single-motor) electric drivetrain, unlocking an additional 85 kW (114 hp) and 150 Nm of torque via overboost mode, with a custom torque vectoring algorithm for rear-biased power delivery (0-100 km/h in 4.8s for the 520 hp variant). Requires APR’s proprietary **HV Battery Thermal Management Upgrade** (liquid-cooled heat exchanger with 30% increased flow rate) to prevent thermal throttling during track use.

Unicorn Racing **Carbon Fiber Reinforced Silicon Carbide (C/SiC) brake rotors** (420mm front, 380mm rear) with **Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers** (front) and **4-piston calipers** (rear), paired with **Pagid RS29** racing pads for a 40% reduction in unsprung weight and 30% improved fade resistance under 1,200°C temperatures. Includes **H&R 25mm wheel spacers** to accommodate the larger brake kit without fender modification.

ABT Sportsline **e-Line Performance Suspension System** with **3-way adjustable Öhlins DFV dampers** (adjustable compression/rebound/height), **Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs** (35mm drop), and **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement plates** to eliminate chassis flex during high-G cornering. Includes **ABT’s Dynamic Chassis Control (DCC) recalibration** for adaptive damping tuned to the Q4’s 50:50 weight distribution.
estetica: Liberty Walk **LB-WORKS Q4 e-tron Sportback Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom 3D-printed ABS diffuser** (tested in Audi’s wind tunnel for -12% drag coefficient). Includes **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** (2.5-inch wider track) to accommodate the **HRE FF01** 22x10.5J (front) and 22x12.5J (rear) forged wheels with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** tires (275/30R22 front, 315/25R22 rear).

Vorsteiner **Carbon Fiber Front Lip Spoiler** (with integrated **Audi Laserlight-compatible LED DRLs**) and **GT-style rear wing** (adjustable angle, 3D-printed from Toray T800 carbon fiber, generating 45kg of downforce at 120 km/h). Includes **debadged grille** with **custom 3M Gloss Black Chrome delete** and **Audi Sport S-line emblem relocation** to the lower bumper.

KW Automotive **Illuminated Door Sills** (RGB LED with **Audi Virtual Cockpit integration**) and **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point harness pass-through, and **heated/ventilated Alcantara with Nappa leather bolsters**). Interior trim replaced with **034 Motorsport billet aluminum shift paddles**, **MOMO Mod.73 steering wheel** (flat-bottom, suede-wrapped), and **custom carbon fiber headliner** (matching the **Audi Exclusive ‘Carbon Sigma’** weave).
